name: babylon
description: Babylon.js integration (engine-neutrality, direction 2): Babylon renders a PBR showcase on its own WebGPU device, then the honest CPU-copy path — RenderTargetTexture.readPixels() -> denoiser.denoise() -> RawTexture.update — bridges to the denoiser's separate device. The reference for the 'custom engines' guide's two-device story.
